payload.prompt_preview: You are running inside a benchmark workspace. Solve the task using only the provided tools and files inside the workspace. Do not assume access to evaluation files. Return a concise final summary.
You are running inside a benchmark workspace. Solve the task using only the provided tools and files inside the workspace. Do not assume access to evaluation files. Return a concise final summary.

payload.output_preview:
Short answer (current as of 15 March 2026)

1) Most recent enforcement milestone
- The most recent milestone that actually came into effect was 2 August 2025 — on that date “Chapter III Section 4, Chapter V, Chapter VII and Chapter XII and Article 78” of the AI Act came into application. That package includes the governance/transparency provisions and the specific obligations aimed at providers of general‑purpose AI models (GPAI). ([ai-act-service-desk.ec.europa.eu](https://ai-act-service-desk.ec.europa.eu/en/ai-act/article-113?utm_source=openai))

2) Which obligations apply next
- The next big applicability date is 2 August 2026 — this is when the majority of the AI Act’s substantive obligations become applicable across the EU (including many rules for high‑risk AI systems listed in Annex III, broad transparency duties and many deployer/provider obligations). Expect enforcement activity to increase after that date. ([ai-act-service-desk.ec.europa.eu](https://ai-act-service-desk.ec.eur...<truncated>
